item.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, August 29th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9592, (Fri, Aug 29th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green

item.title: Increasing Searches for ZIP Files, (Thu, Aug 28th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
item.content:encoded: I noticed recently that we have more and more requests for ZIP files in our web honeypot logs. Over the last year, we have had a substantial increase in these requests.

item.title: ISC Stormcast For Thursday, August 28th, 2025 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9590, (Thu, Aug 28th)
item.source: SANS Internet Storm Center, InfoCON: green
